title: Ayodhyecha Raja

actors: Govindrao Tembe, Durga Khote, Baburao Pendharkar
plot: When Bhagwan Shri Narad Muni informs the inhabitants of Swarglok about Raja Harishchandra's compassion and generosity, Sage Vishwamitra decides to verify this for himself and travels to meet the Raja. Once there, he demands the Ra...
